name: loopkit
description: Design, run, verify, resume, schedule, and diagnose bounded loops on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex with durable host-scoped state and evidence-gated completion.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded loops with durable evidence on Claude Code, Cowork, and Codex.
interface.longDescription: LoopKit turns repeatable work into bounded loops on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex. It creates durable contracts, runs evidence-gated iterations, restores compact checkpoints, prepares scheduled tasks on the host scheduling surface, and diagnoses stalled or unsafe runs.
defaultPrompt: Turn this recurring task into a bounded Codex loop.
Resume the active LoopKit run from its checkpoint.
Diagnose why this loop keeps repeating.
